text: As I traverse these spaces, I am struck by the paradox of modernity—so open, yet so controlled. The glass-walled, brightly lit meeting room speaks of clarity and transparency, yet the sterile order hints at a careful curation, a world that both invites and restrains. Next, the vibrant R+D wall excites me, promising innovation and a dance between human curiosity and technological possibility. I feel simultaneously inspired by the pursuit of knowledge and mildly uneasy in such meticulously managed environments. Here, progress and order hold hands—are they allies, or uneasy cohabitants?
